lift.warmup: Pre-lift wrist-extensor isometric 3×30s/arm (§10.A tennis-elbow). Incline BB ramp: bar×8, 95×5, 115×3, then working. General: 1–2 min band pull-aparts / scap push-ups.
lift.cooldown: Daily SI prehab — clamshell, side-lying abduction, single-leg bridge, bird-dog, side plank. Tyler twists 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15 (§10.A dailies).
